'''Shadow''' was one of the four [[Stormtrooper/Legends|members]] of [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] of the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st Legion]] in the [[Empire of the Hand]]. The Unit consisted of [[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]], [[Cloud (stormtrooper)|Cloud]], [[Watchman (stormtrooper)|Watchman]], and Shadow.

==Biography==
====Overthrowing a Warlord====
He aided the [[Eickarie]]s in the [[Capture of the Warlord|liberation of Kariek]] from [[the Warlord]] who had taken over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. After breaching the [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] with the help of a resistance group lead by [[Su-mil]] through an unknown entryway they aided the Eickaries in freeing the Warlords [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. Shadow led a group of Eickarie resistance soldiers and prisoners to assist the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] trying to gain access to the fortress through the tunnels.

====The Rediscovery of Outbound Flight====
Later, in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Shadow [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|accompanied]] [[Chak Fel]] aboard the [[Chaf Envoy]] to [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]] along with the rest of Unit Aurek-Seven as a [[guard detail]] for the commander. Shadow also participated in the Battle of the Redoubt helping [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] Skywalker in securing the remains of [[Outbound Flight Project|Outbound Flight]] against the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]. Following the battle, Commander Fel led the Unit to join [[General/Legends|General]] [[Prard'ras'kleoni|Drask]]'s [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] to Vagaari [[Realspace/Legends|space]].
